CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-587460 WITH CASE CGC-21-595195
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-587460 WITH CASE CGC-21-595195

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

City and County of San Francisco's unopposed motion to consolidate cases CGC-20-587460 and CGC-21-595195 is granted. Future filings shall be made in the first-filed case (587460).

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
